india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Wednesday
india_trends.summary: Indian equity markets extended losses for a fourth straight session as broad-based selling in IT, banking, auto, and consumer stocks dragged benchmarks lower. india_trends.title: Will provide insurance to all vessels coming to or going from India: DFS Secretary Nagaraju
india_trends.summary: India has launched its own maritime insurance pool. This initiative aims to support Indian maritime trade. Vedanta Sterlite, Balrampur Sugar, and Hoger Offshore are the first beneficiaries. The pool reduces reliance on foreign insurers. It offers financial protection against war perils and cargo ris

india_trends.title: RBI cancels licence of Mumbai-based Sarvodaya Co-operative Bank
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has made the tough call to withdraw the license of Sarvodaya Co-operative Bank, a decision rooted in the bank's failing capital and declining revenue capabilities. As of May 12, 2026, all banking activities will halt. In a bid to protect depositors, the bank's clients will

india_trends.title: Dixon pins FY27 growth hopes on Vivo JV approval, steady mobile demand
india_trends.summary: Dixon Technologies said the company is in advanced-stage talks with the government regarding the Vivo joint venture and remains confident that approval is only a matter of time away

india_trends.title: Malabar Gold backs Modi’s call on responsible gold use, seeks overhaul of monetisation scheme
india_trends.summary: Malabar Gold & Diamonds proposed enhancements to the Gold Monetisation Scheme to boost public participation and mobilize idle gold. The company suggests integrating organized jewelers, reducing minimum deposit quantities, and offering flexible redemption options to reduce import dependency and s

india_trends.title: Berger Paints Q4 profit jumps 27% to Rs 335 crore on strong demand and margins
india_trends.summary: Berger Paints reported a strong 27% rise in quarterly profit driven by higher volumes, improved product mix, and robust gross margins. Revenue and EBITDA also grew, though the company flagged risks from crude volatility, currency depreciation, and geopolitical disruptions impacting costs and inflati

india_trends.title: Sebi weighs revising position limits on farm derivatives
india_trends.summary: In a consultation paper, Sebi has said the existing limits, framed in 2017, may no longer fully reflect the growth in India’s commodity derivatives market.

india_trends.title: Need nuts-and-bolts reforms, industry must invest in R&D: NITI Aayog's Gauba
india_trends.summary: Niti Aayog member Rajiv Gauba said next-generation reforms must make a clean, decisive break from the colonial mindset of distrust of citizens and punishment even for small violations to trust-based governance

india_trends.title: Kalpataru FY26 pre-sales up 17% to Rs 5,280 cr; Q4 net profit at Rs 194 cr
india_trends.summary: Kalpataru delivered its strongest operational performance with record pre-sales, collections, and profit growth driven by strong demand across Mumbai projects. Improved sale realisations, robust project completions, and debt reduction strengthened the developer’s financial position despite accountin

india_trends.title: Dixon Tech Q4 profit falls 36% despite revenue growth and expansion plans
india_trends.summary: Dixon Technologies reported a sharp decline in quarterly profit due to weak consumer demand, rising component costs, and the end of PLI benefits. Despite margin pressure, the company expects strong FY27 growth driven by smartphone manufacturing, telecom equipment, exports, and IT hardware expansion.

india_trends.title: Nexus Select Trust Q4 net operating income up 11% at Rs 440 crore
india_trends.summary: Nexus Select Trust reported strong quarterly growth driven by rising tenant sales, stable occupancy, and higher retail income across key consumption categories. The retail REIT expanded its portfolio through acquisitions and development deals while maintaining healthy payouts and guiding continued d

india_trends.title: Statistics ministry pushes GDP data release to June to improve accuracy
india_trends.summary: The Statistics and Programme Implementation Ministry has changed when it releases GDP data. Provisional GDP estimates and fourth-quarter GDP data will now be released by June 7 each year. This adjustment allows for more complete data from companies and government sources. The ministry aims to improv

india_trends.title: Cut waste, curb imports: Piyush Goyal’s ‘wake-up call’ to Indian industry
india_trends.summary: Goyal said India need to be become more efficient, productive and self-reliant the current global geopolitical and economic environment.

Sensex tumbles, VIX jumps as West Asia fears hammer markets
india_trends.summary: On Tuesday, the Sensex tumbled 1.9% while the Nifty 50 fell 1.8%, extending its losses over four successive sessions to 4%.

india_trends.summary: Sensex tumbles, VIX jumps as West Asia fears hammer markets    Mint

india_trends.title: ‘It is coming, and it is coming big’: Uday Kotak on oil price shock
india_trends.summary: Uday Kotak has cautioned that the impact of surging oil prices from the West Asia war is coming soon. He stresses the importance of preparation and proactive measures, as India has maintained stable fuel prices despite global increases, which may soon alter.

india_trends.title: Small-cap stock hits upper circuit after Q4 results 2026
india_trends.summary: A-1 Limited's stock surged 5% following a strong Q4 FY26 performance, with a net profit of ₹4.36 crore, a 417.11% YoY increase. The company reported consolidated revenue of ₹145.27 crore and announced plans to expand its fleet and operations.
